title: lithospermum fruticosum var. erectum
intro: Lithospermum fruticosum var. erectum, also known as the stoneseed or erect lithospermum, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and native to North America. Traditionally, lithospermum has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its compounds such as lithospermic acid and caffeic acid. The health benefits of lithospermum fruticosum var. erectum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activities, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Lithospermum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as to promote overall well-being.
